title: grastidium pulleanum
intro: Grastidium pulleanum, also known as the Australian pine, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Grastidium pulleanum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
